subcodes.first_line: O thou eloquent herald! Indeed thou hast chanted the verses of thy love that speak of thy turning unto God and thy supplication to the Kingdom of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها البارع الصادع قد رتلت ایات حبک الناطقه بتوجهک الی الله و تضرعک الی ملکوت الله
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
